scripts.build: npm run css:build && npm run js:build && npm run add:banners
scripts.css:expanded: npx mkdirp assets/dist/css && npx sass assets/scss/style.scss assets/dist/css/style.css --style=expanded && npx mkdirp assets/dist/css/alfuix && npx sass assets/scss/alfuix/alfuix.scss assets/dist/css/alfuix/alfuix.css --style=expanded && npx mkdirp assets/dist/css/bootstrap && npx sass assets/scss/bootstrap/bootstrap.scss assets/dist/css/bootstrap/bootstrap.css --style=expanded && npx sass assets/scss/bootstrap/bootstrap-icons.scss assets/dist/css/bootstrap/bootstrap-icons.css --style=expanded
